description: Memory persistence schema for Digital Immortality cross-session storage.

content.description: The actual memory content — insight, correction, decision, or calibration note.

source.description: Which cycle or session produced this entry (e.g. 'cycle-5', 'manual', 'boot-test').

corrections.description: Behavioral corrections from boot tests. When a boot test fails, the correction that fixed it goes here so the twin never regresses.

insights.description: Cross-domain patterns discovered during recursive cycles. Insights that connect different life domains or reveal new principles.

decisions.description: Decisions made and their outcomes. Audit trail for decision fidelity tracking.

calibration.description: DNA calibration notes. Adjustments to the twin's behavioral model from conversations or corrections.
